name: Integrating Smart Collections in Shopify
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integrating smart collections in Shopify enables dynamic product groupings that automatically update based on product attributes and rules. When collections adapt automatically to inventory changes, you help improve merchandising efficiency and ensure customers always see current, relevant product selections, which tends to enhance conversion rates through more accurate and up-to-date product categorization."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automated collection management reduces manual merchandising effort while maintaining collection accuracy. This helps you scale merchandising operations more effectively and ensures consistent product discovery experiences, supporting better conversion performance through collections that automatically reflect your current catalog and merchandising strategies."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "To integrate Smart Collections follow these steps:"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/integration-smart-collection#to-integrate-findify-smart-collection-follow-these-steps", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "to-integrate-smart-collections-follow-these-steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add a div tag"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add extra content to Smart Collections"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a fallback for Smart Collections"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Add a div tag"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/integration-smart-collection#1-add-a-div-tag", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "1-add-a-div-tag"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All you need to do is add one div tag to anywhere you'd like to include your Smart Collection[s]"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ", for example

Some extra text

2. Add extra content to Findify's Smart Collections

The Findify Smart Collection results can be easily decorated with any content from your store (like custom banners, reviews, recommendations. etc).
All you need to do is put the content before and/or after the Findify Smart Collection\u00a0div"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "3. Create a fallback for Smart Collections"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/integration-smart-collection#3-create-a-fallback-for-findifys-smart-collections", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "3-create-a-fallback-for-smart-collections"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note: if you do not add a fallback, nothing will be displayed on the page in case our servers go down.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the unlikely event that our servers are not responding, you can add a fallback to display custom markup instead of Smart Collections."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To do this, you need to add a "}, {"text": "div", "code": true}, {"text": " to the page with the following "}, {"text": "class", "code": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "style", "code": true}, {"text": ", which should reside inside of the "}, {"text": "data-findify=\"search\"", "code": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "div", "code": true}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "

..... default collection code goes here....
"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Anything that you will put inside the "}, {"text": "div", "code": true}, {"text": " will be rendered as a fallback."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "4. Shopify Integration"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/integration-smart-collection#4-shopify-integration", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "4-shopify-integration"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As you are a Shopify customer, you should put the Smart Collection HTML "}, {"text": "div", "code": true}, {"text": " code into your "}, {"text": "collection.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " template."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This way you can use liquid template variables to easily extend the collection page's content."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Replacing all your Shopify collections with Merchandising Cloud Smart Collections"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/integration-smart-collection#replacing-all-your-shopify-collections-with-findify-smart-collections", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "replacing-all-your-shopify-collections-with-merchandising-cloud-smart-collections"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Don't forget to include the current collection code in the fallback div", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Put this code in your "}, {"text": "collection.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": " template file (or another collection template file)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
..... default collection code goes here....
"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
